name: python3-setuptools-whl
title: python3-setuptools-whl
description:
Python Distutils Enhancements (wheel package)
Extensions to the python-distutils for large or complex distributions.
.
This is the support package for the PEP 427 wheel version of the package,
required for using setuptools inside a virtual environment.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-setuptools-whl because Python Distutils Enhancements (wheel package).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-setuptools-whl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-setuptools-whl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-setuptools-whl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
